description_long: This government building complex consists of several large, rectangular structures arranged symmetrically around a central open plaza. The buildings are predominantly white with flat roofs and minimal exterior ornamentation, suggesting a modern, utilitarian design. The central plaza features wide walkways, landscaped green areas, and a prominent entrance area with steps and a canopy. Rows of trees line the perimeter and internal pathways, providing greenery and separation from the surrounding environment. The main entrance is marked by a broad staircase and a covered entryway, creating a formal and accessible approach. The overall layout emphasizes openness, accessibility, and a sense of civic order.
description: A modern, white government building complex with multiple rectangular structures, a central plaza, landscaped greenery, and a prominent main entrance with steps and canopy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a broad staircase, canopy, and symmetrical arrangement of buildings flanking a central plaza.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the complex, the alignment of buildings, and the tree-lined pathways along the perimeter.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open central plaza, the backs of the buildings, and the continuation of the landscaped areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the parallel arrangement of buildings and the extensive walkways between them.
attribute_public_entrance_design: The main public entrance features a broad staircase leading up to a covered entryway with a canopy, flanked by landscaped greenery and wide, accessible walkways.
